stemHtml: Which of the following statements is true about the taxiway design?

options.a: Taxiways are designed so that the cockpit undershoots the taxiway centre line.
options.b: Taxiways are designed so that the cockpit remains always left of the taxiway centre line.
options.c: Taxiways are designed so that the cockpit overshoots the taxiway centre line.
options.d: Taxiways are designed so that the cockpit remains over the taxiway centre line.
